viewActions.deleteConfirmContent: 您确定要删除选取的 {1} 笔数据？
viewActions.uploadAndSaveDirtyRows: 上传并储存异动的列数据
viewActions.rowValidationFailed: 列数据检核失败，无法上传！

formActions.reauditSuccess: 已成功启动窗体重审流程！
formActions.reviewSuccess: 送出回复会签意见成功！
formActions.executeSuccess: 送出处理完成通知成功！
formActions.formUpdateNeeded: 您已异动本单内容，提交后将自动储存异动的内容！

import.title: 离开确认
import.content: 您尚未上传（汇入）档案，确定要放弃并离开？

dataRevert.title: 数据回复确认
content: 您已异动了列数据，确认后将回复为异动前的数据！
您确定要回复？

changeAssignee.title: 变更确认
changeAssignee.content: 您确定要将所选的 {1} 份表单待处理人员变更为「{2}」？

removePendingForms.title: 执行确认
content: 此动作会检查并自动移除您已处理完成的待处理表单！
您确定要执行？

save.void: 您尚未异动窗体属性，无须执行保存！

confirm.title: 送审确认
content: 所有字段检核无误！
您确定要送审本申请单？

confirmation.title: 保存确认
content: 确定要保存？

confirmation.title: 同意确认
content: 您确定要审批同意？

confirmation.title: 不同意确认
content: 您确定要审批不同意？

confirmation.title: 会签确认
content: 确定要送出会签意见？

EXECUTE.title: 承办意见
EXECUTE.comments: 我已处理完成您所指派的任务。

confirmation.title: 完成确认
content: 确定要完成指派事项？

confirmation.title: 略过确认
content: 您确定要略过选取的处理人员吗？
略过后，选取的处理人员将不再显示在列表中。

confirmation.title: 批次完成确认
confirmation.confirmText: 我要批次完成选取的待处理表单
content: 您确定要批次完成选取的待处理表单吗？

confirmation.title: 撤件确认
content: 您确定要撤件？

viewActions.deleteConfirmContent: Are you sure you want to delete the selected {1} row(s) of data?
viewActions.rowValidationFailed: One or more field values have been validated with errors!
viewActions.rowsSaved: Row data uploaded and saved successfully!

formActions.formUpdateNeeded: You have modified the form data, and they will be automatically saved after submission!

deleteRows.title: Delete Confirmation
deleteRows.content: Are you sure you want to delete the selected {1} row(s) of data?

dataDirty.title: Data Modification Notice
content: The data in this form has been modified!
Please re-open this form after refreshing the data table!

discardChanges.title: Exit Confirmation
content: You have modified the data in this form.
Are you sure you want to discard the changes?

import.title: Exit Confirmation
import.content: Are you sure you want to exit without uploading (importing)?

dataRevert.title: Data Revert Confirmation
content: You have modified the row data!
Are you sure you want to revert to its original state?

changeAssignee.title: Change Confirmation
changeAssignee.content: Are you sure you want to change the current pending assignee for the selected {1} forms to "{2}"?

removePendingForms.title: Execute Confirmation
content: This action will check and automatically remove the completed forms you have processed!
Are you sure you want to execute?

save.void: You have not made any changes to this form. There is no need to save!

apply.error: The data in this form have been validated with ERRORS!

confirm.title: Apply Confirmation
content: The data in this form have been validated WITHOUT errors!
Are you sure you want to apply this form?

confirmation.title: Save Confirmation
content: Are you sure you want to save?

AGREE.title: Agree Comment
AGREE.placeholder: Please enter the reason for agreement...

confirmation.title: Agreement Confirmation
content: Are you sure you want to approve and agree?

DISAGREE.title: Disagreement Comment
DISAGREE.placeholder: Please enter the reason for disagreement...

confirmation.title: Disagreement Confirmation
content: Are you sure you want to disapprove?

confirmation.title: Review Confirmation
content: Are you sure you want to submit?

confirmation.title: Submit Confirmation
content: Are you sure you want to submit?

SKIP_TASK.title: Skip Reason
SKIP_TASK.placeholder: Please enter the reason for skipping the assignee(s)...

confirmation.title: Skip Assignees Confirmation
content: Are you sure you want to skip the selected assignees(s)?
After skipping, the selected assignees(s) will no longer be displayed in the list.

confirmation.title: Batch Completion Confirmation
confirmation.confirmText: I want to batch complete the selected pending forms
content: Are you sure you want to batch complete the selected pending forms?

WITHDRAW.title: Reason for Withdrawal
WITHDRAW.placeholder: Please enter the reason for withdrawal...

confirmation.title: Withdrawal Confirmation
content: Are you sure you want to withdraw this form?

/app: Peran dan Otorisasi Semua Sistem Aplikasi

viewActions.deleteConfirmContent: Anda yakin ingin menghapus {1} data yang dipilih?
viewActions.uploadAndSaveDirtyRows: Unggah dan Simpan Data Baris yang Diubah
viewActions.rowValidationFailed: Validasi Data Baris Gagal, Tidak Dapat Diunggah!

formActions.reauditSuccess: Proses Audit Ulang Formulir Berhasil Dimulai!
formActions.reviewSuccess: Pengiriman Balasan Pendapat Peninjauan Bersama Berhasil!
formActions.formUpdateNeeded: Anda telah mengubah konten formulir ini, pengiriman akan secara otomatis menyimpan konten yang diubah!

import.title: Konfirmasi Keluar
import.content: Anda belum mengunggah (mengimpor) file. Apakah Anda yakin ingin membatalkan dan keluar?

dataRevert.title: Konfirmasi Pemulihan Data
content: Anda telah mengubah data dalam baris. Setelah dikonfirmasi, data akan dikembalikan ke kondisi sebelum perubahan!
Apakah Anda yakin ingin memulihkan?

changeAssignee.title: Konfirmasi Perubahan
changeAssignee.content: Apakah Anda yakin ingin mengubah penanggung jawab tertunda saat ini untuk {1} formulir yang dipilih menjadi "{2}"?

removePendingForms.title: Konfirmasi penyelesaian
content: Tindakan ini akan memeriksa dan secara otomatis menghapus formulir tertunda yang telah Anda selesaikan!
Apakah Anda yakin ingin menyelesaikan?

save.void: Anda belum mengubah properti formulir, tidak perlu menyimpan!

confirm.title: Konfirmasi Pengajuan
content: Semua kolom telah divalidasi tanpa kesalahan!
Apakah Anda yakin ingin mengajukan permohonan ini?

confirmation.title: Konfirmasi Simpan
content: Apakah Anda yakin ingin menyimpan?

confirmation.title: Konfirmasi Persetujuan
content: Apakah Anda yakin ingin menyetujui dan menyepakati?

confirmation.title: Konfirmasi Ketidaksetujuan
content: Apakah Anda yakin ingin menolak?

confirmation.title: Konfirmasi Paraf
content: Apakah Anda yakin ingin mengirim pendapat paraf?

EXECUTE.title: Pendapat Pelaksana
EXECUTE.comments: Saya telah menyelesaikan tugas yang Anda tugaskan.

confirmation.title: Konfirmasi Penyelesaian
content: Apakah Anda yakin ingin menyelesaikan tugas yang ditugaskan?

confirmation.title: Konfirmasi Lewati
content: Apakah Anda yakin ingin melewati petugas yang dipilih?
Setelah dilewati, tugas yang dipilih tidak akan ditampilkan lagi di daftar.

confirmation.title: Konfirmasi Penyelesaian Batch
confirmation.confirmText: Saya ingin menyelesaikan batch formulir tertunda yang dipilih
content: Apakah Anda yakin ingin menyelesaikan batch formulir tertunda yang dipilih?

confirmation.title: Konfirmasi Penarikan
content: Apakah Anda yakin ingin menarik formulir ini?
